sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72488" key="oi)nobrexh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνο-βρεχής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n72488.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wine-soaked, drunken,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.428.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
